A.A: The Founder’s Daily Checklist: How I Stay Focused & Sane

Foundership can feel like 27 tabs open all the time.
This simple checklist keeps me grounded, sharp, and moving forward — daily.

Before checking emails or socials:
 🔲 Review top 3 priorities
 🔲 5-minute journal (what matters today?)
 🔲 15-min walk or stretch (no phone)
Want a copy of this as a printable checklist?

Drop a comment and I’ll send it your way.
 Or save this for your next reset day.
